Stardew Valley.description: A cozy farming sim where you grow crops, raise animals, befriend villagers, and build the farm of your dreams.

Palia.description: A relaxing community sim MMO where you can fish, farm, build, and form relationships in a cozy world.

Fae Farm.description: A magical farming sim where you cultivate crops, brew potions, and explore a whimsical world full of enchantment.

Dinkum.description: An Aussie-themed sim where you build a town, farm, mine, and care for animals in the Outback.

Trash Goblin.description: A charming sim where you sort trash and clean up the environment as a lovable goblin.

Dredge.description: A mysterious fishing adventure set in haunted seas with Lovecraftian horror lurking beneath.

Tiny Glade.description: A peaceful castle-building toy with no goals or stress, just creativity and relaxation.

Reka.description: A fantasy sim where you play a witch traveling in a walking house through a folkloric world.

Wanderstop.description: Run a cozy tea shop in a surreal, dreamlike forest while exploring themes of rest and transformation.

A Little to the Left.description: A cozy puzzle game about tidying up and organizing objects in satisfying ways.

Spilled!.description: Clean up an oil spill in a relaxing, low-poly ocean environment as you restore nature.

Toem.description: Embark on a whimsical journey and solve puzzles using photography in a charming black-and-white world.

Paper Trail.description: A top-down puzzle adventure about leaving home, set in a foldable paper world full of mysteries.

Love, Ghostie.description: Play as a helpful ghost matchmaker who helps guests at a B&B find love and closure.

Little Kitty, Big City.description: Explore a vibrant city as a curious cat, causing chaos, helping humans, and collecting hats.

Cozy Caravan.description: Trade goods, make friends, and explore a beautiful world in your customizable cozy caravan.

Hello Kitty Island Adventure.description: Join Hello Kitty and friends on a relaxing island getaway filled with friendship, crafting, and exploration.

Minami Lane.description: Build and manage a nostalgic Japanese street in this short and relaxing sim.

Critter Cove.description: Rebuild a tropical town and befriend quirky animal residents in this cozy life sim adventure.

Sugardew Island.description: Grow crops, cook meals, and care for animals on a magical island full of kindness.

Lonesome Village.description: A puzzle-solving life sim adventure where you restore a quiet village and uncover mysteries.

Lake.description: A relaxing narrative game where you deliver mail in a small town and reconnect with people.

Fruitbus.description: A cozy cooking and exploration game where you travel in a food truck serving heartwarming meals.

Tavern Talk.description: Serve drinks and advice in a cozy tavern in this narrative-driven bartending game.

Book Bound.description: A puzzle adventure through storybook worlds where you repair broken narratives and meet quirky characters.

Cozy Grove.description: A life sim set on a haunted island where you help ghostly bear spirits and decorate your campsite.

Wylde Flowers.description: A cozy farming sim with a magical twist where you play as a witch balancing daily life and spellcraft.

Lil Gator Game.description: Explore a cute open world as a playful gator, helping friends and climbing everything in sight.

A Short Hike.description: Hike, glide, and climb your way through a peaceful mountain park in this charming exploration game.

Cat Cafe Manager.description: Renovate and run your own cat café, hiring staff, adopting cats, and pleasing quirky customers.

Dancing Pandas: Ranger's Path.description: Help panda rangers restore the forest in this cozy rhythm and nature sim.

Space Sprouts.description: Grow plants and explore alien worlds in this relaxing space gardening game.

Spiritfarer.description: Guide spirits to the afterlife in this heartfelt management and crafting sim.

Animal Crossing: New Horizons.description: Build your dream island life in this iconic cozy and social simulation.

The Sims 2.description: Live out your dream lives in this beloved life simulation classic.

The Sims 3.description: Control every detail of your Sims' lives in a rich open world.

The Sims 4.description: Create and control Sims in this detailed life simulation experience.

inZOI.description: A realistic life simulator with detailed customization and immersive environments.

My Time at Portia.description: Rebuild your workshop and befriend villagers in this cozy crafting sim.

My Time at Sandrock.description: A post-apocalyptic life sim where you build, farm, and explore in a desert town.

Ooblets.description: A creature-collecting, dancing, farming life sim with adorable ooblets.

Firewatch.description: A narrative-driven mystery game set in the Wyoming wilderness.

Mini Motorways.description: A minimalist strategy game about designing a road network for a growing city.

Cities: Skylines.description: A modern city-building game with in-depth management mechanics.

Fields of Mistria.description: A fantasy farming and life sim with RPG elements and romance.

Sky: Children of the Light.description: A social adventure game focused on exploration, flight, and emotion.

Infinity Nikki.description: An open-world dress-up adventure game set in a magical fantasy world.

Unpacking.description: A zen puzzle game about unpacking and discovering a character's story.

Strange Horticulture.description: An occult puzzle game where you run a mysterious plant shop.

Disney Dreamlight Valley.description: A cozy life sim filled with Disney and Pixar characters where you restore a magical village.

Coffee Talk.description: A visual novel where you brew drinks and listen to the problems of fantasy customers in a late-night coffee shop.

Call of Boba.description: Run a cute boba tea stand, serve drinks, and chat with quirky customers.

Spirit of the North.description: A serene adventure game inspired by Nordic folklore where you play as a fox guided by a spirit.

Neva.description: Follow a young woman and a mystical wolf as they journey through a dying world teeming with danger and beauty.

Wytchwood.description: A crafting adventure where you play as a witch collecting ingredients and solving puzzles in a strange fairy tale world.

Lemon Cake.description: Restore an abandoned bakery and bake sweet treats in this charming time management sim.

Paleo Pines.description: Tame dinosaurs and build a ranch in a colorful, cozy world.

Cult of the Lamb.description: Start your own cult in a cute but dark world filled with ritual, dungeon crawling, and base building.

Sun Haven.description: A fantasy farming sim where you grow crops, raise animals, and master magic in a multiplayer world.

Roots of Pacha.description: A Stone Age farming sim where you develop a village, befriend animals, and explore early civilization.

Coral Island.description: A tropical farming sim with environmental themes, diving, and community development.

Potion Permit.description: Play as a chemist in a pixel art village, diagnose illnesses and craft potions for townsfolk.

Littlewood.description: Build a town and form relationships after saving the world in this relaxing RPG sim.

Potion Craft.description: A medieval alchemist sim where you physically mix ingredients and craft potions.

Slime Rancher.description: Manage a slime farm on a faraway planet, collecting and breeding adorable slimes.

Slime Rancher 2.description: The sequel to the beloved slime sim, featuring new slimes and an open-world island.

The Cosmic Wheel Sisterhood.description: A narrative-driven deckbuilding game about witches, fate, and branching storytelling.

Graveyard Keeper.description: A darkly humorous cemetery sim where you manage a medieval graveyard and craft supplies.

Planet Zoo.description: Build and manage a zoo with detailed animal behavior and expansive creativity tools.

Planet Coaster.description: Design and manage your own theme park with thrilling roller coasters and attractions.

Planet Coaster 2.description: The next generation of theme park creation, featuring deeper tools and more customization.

House Flipper.description: Buy, renovate, and sell houses in this satisfying home makeover simulation game.

House Flipper 2.description: A more advanced renovation experience with new mechanics and expanded customization options.

TCG Card Shop Simulator.description: Run your own card shop, manage inventory, and build your collection in this business sim.

PowerWash Simulator.description: Relax and clean your way through satisfying power washing jobs.

Dave the Diver.description: Explore the deep sea by day and run a sushi bar by night in this quirky adventure.

Two Point Hospital.description: Build and manage your own whimsical hospital with comical illnesses and treatments.

Two Point Campus.description: Create your dream university and manage quirky courses and student lives.

Two Point Museum.description: An upcoming quirky sim where you run a strange and creative museum.

Frog Detective.description: A quirky mystery adventure where you play a frog solving light-hearted cases.

Venba.description: A narrative cooking game exploring culture and family through authentic South Indian recipes.

Untitled Goose Game.description: Cause playful chaos as a mischievous goose in a charming village.

Hogwarts Legacy.description: Live your wizarding world fantasy in this immersive open-world RPG set in the Harry Potter universe.

Botany Manor.description: Explore a historical English manor and solve botanical puzzles in this cozy mystery game.

Monument Valley.description: A beautiful, surreal puzzle game featuring impossible architecture and a silent princess.

Monument Valley 2.description: Guide a mother and child through stunning, mind-bending architecture in this elegant puzzle adventure.

Journey.description: An evocative adventure game where you explore a vast desert in search of meaning.

ABZU.description: A beautiful underwater journey full of life, color, and serenity.

Caravan SandWitch.description: Explore a sci-fantasy desert world in your van and uncover the truth of a lost civilization.
